name: Sichuan Guangan AAAPublic Co.,Ltd
summary: Sichuan Guangan AAAPublic Co.,Ltd operates in the electricity, gas, and water businesses in China. The company generates and supplies hydroelectric power; and supplies natural gas, electricity, and drinking water. The company operates 12 waterworks and 1 sewage treatment plant; and 13 hydropower stations with an installed capacity of 491,200 kilowatts, as well as 11 110kV and 23 35kV substations, and 35kV switch stations. It also operates 8 gas storage and distribution stations, including 5 LNG storage and distribution stations; 13 gas distribution stations; 12 pressure regulating stations; 4 CNG filling stations; and 1 desulfurization station. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Guang'an, China.
